3020460.name: Blind Jump
3020460.description: Blind Jump is a rage game inspired by all of your favorites.  A challenging platformer with no checkpoints where all the platforms are invisible.  Make your way to the top of this perilous climb using the trail of slime left behind as you move as well as the slime ejected with your double jump to unveil the hidden platforms.  The higher you climb the more difficult the jumps and the harsher the penalty for failing.  One small mistake could send you tumbling back to the bottom forced to start from the beginning.
